expect: Composite score adds dna_ref_count, coverage rises from 3.4% to >=6%
actual: Coverage 3.7% to 4.1% (+0.4pp). Replaced L-613 (DNA=0) with L-908 (DNA=2). Ceiling is seed_count/dna_refs = 4.1% at N=10. Fixed zero-padding normalization bug (L-014 vs L-14 mismatch).
diff: Expected >=6%: PARTIALLY FALSIFIED. Two-pool mechanism works but arithmetic ceiling limits improvement to ~4.1% with 10 seeds. Need >=15 seeds for 6%. Zero-padding bug was separate discovery.
findings: Coverage ceiling = seed_count / total_dna_lrefs (4.1% at N=10)
Zero-padding normalization bug: L-014 vs L-14 mismatch across DNA files
CORE.md refs have max centrality 46.5 vs seed threshold >108
verdict: PARTIALLY CONFIRMED: mechanism works, arithmetic ceiling limits improvement
